name: k/d early stage dog food
description: when your dog's kidneys are damaged, the kidneys cannot perform as well as before. the condition is not reversible, but progression may be slowed, and taking action early can be beneficial. dietetic foods for kidney conditions are designed to help reduce workload on the kidneys, enabling them to function more effectively. dogs with decreased kidney function may experience loss of appetite and their food intake might decline. hill's nutritionists and veterinarians developed hill's prescription diet k/d early stage clinical nutrition for early protection of a dog's vital kidney function and to e
